title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind researchers at the University of Cambridge use AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to identify bacterial defense mechanisms against antibiotics. The approach compresses structural biology analysis from years into minutes to accelerate antimicrobial resistance research.
